revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23176857634|manual triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Col-begin%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Col-begin%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Documentation subpage}}
<!-- EDIT TEMPLATE DOCUMENTATION BELOW THIS LINE -->
{{distinguish|text=[[Template:Colbegin]], a redirect to [[Template:Div col]]}}
{{High-use}}
{{caution|This template creates a [[Help:Tables|table]] rather than actual columns.  This means that it may display poorly on mobile devices or narrow screens and is sub-optimal in terms of [[WP:ACCESS|accessibility]].  Approximately 2/3 of English Wikipedia readers are using mobile devices and may have trouble reading the content that is wrapped in this template. Please consider using one of the CSS-based column templates (listed [[#Column-generating template families|at the end of this page]]) instead, or not using columns at all if there are any issues that affect page layout.}}
{{Uses TemplateStyles|Template:Col-begin/styles.css}}
{{tsh|C-s}}
{{Col-begin template}}

{{Col-begin/TemplateData}}

<includeonly>{{subpage other||
}}</includeonly>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Multi-column templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
